news.summary: If the chokepoint were shut, along with the Strait of Hormuz, a quarter of the world's energy supply would be blocked.

news.headline: Hong Kong restaurant revenues drop over Easter break as departures outnumber arrivals
news.summary:
Hong Kong restaurants suffered a 6 to 7 per cent revenue drop over the Easter weekend, an industry source said, as gains from a 15 per cent rise in mainland Chinese tourists failed to offset business lost to 1.7 million departing locals.
